commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=151847c8da222dbae92018c60c2ad8d0f083431a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps MatrixAuthedHttpClient.requestJson JSON.parse failures, adds a malformed JSON unit test, and commits a standalone loopback proof script.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +176. Total +183 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main routes Matrix requestJson callers to a direct JSON.parse on application/json response bodies, so malformed homeserver JSON will throw from that path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can remove or relocate the committed root proof script while preserving the production guard and unit test.

target.title: fix(matrix): guard JSON.parse against malformed homeserver response bodies
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`extensions/matrix/src/matrix/sdk/http-client.ts:55` calls `JSON.parse(text)` on the Matrix homeserver response body without try/catch. Malformed JSON → unhandled SyntaxError.

## Changes

- `extensions/matrix/src/matrix/sdk/http-client.ts`: wrap `JSON.parse(text)` in try/catch → `Error("malformed JSON")` with `statusCode`
- `extensions/matrix/src/matrix/sdk/http-client.test.ts`: test verifying malformed JSON → Error
- `test/_proof_matrix_json_guard.mts`: **v3** — real HTTP server + `MatrixAuthedHttpClient` with `ssrfPolicy: { allowPrivateNetwork: true }` to bypass loopback SSRF

Label: bugfix | merge-risk: 🟢 minimal | AI-assisted

## Evidence

### Real HTTP proof — MatrixAuthedHttpClient.requestJson (L2, v3 SSRF-bypassed)

```
$ node --import tsx test/_proof_matrix_json_guard.mts

[proof] malformed JSON server on :XXXXX
PASS  malformed JSON: throws Error :: type=Error
PASS  malformed JSON: mentions malformed JSON :: msg="Matrix homeserver returned malformed JSON"
PASS  malformed JSON: has statusCode :: statusCode=200
PASS  valid JSON: parsed correctly :: result={"user_id":"@test:matrix.org"}
PASS  non-JSON content type: returns text unchanged :: result="pong"

[proof] 5 PASS, 0 FAIL
```

### Unit test

```
pnpm exec vitest run extensions/matrix/src/matrix/sdk/http-client.test.ts
 ✓ MatrixAuthedHttpClient > throws descriptive error on malformed JSON success response
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
```

### Fix history
- v1: unit test only → `silver shellfish`
- v2: +proof script → SSRF blocked
- **v3**: lint fix (`String()` removal) + `ssrfPolicy: { allowPrivateNetwork: true }` to bypass loopback SSRF in proof
target.author: lsr911

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
